role_summary: the cfo is responsible for the overall financial strategy, performance, governance, and long - term financial sustainability of the organization.
responsibilities: • lead financial strategy and planning   • oversee finance, accoun ting, taxation, treasury, and compliance   • manage capital structure, funding, and investor relations   • drive profitability, cost management, and cash flow optimization   • support m&a, strategic investments, and growth initiatives   • present financial performance to board and stakeholders
qualifications: • qualified ca with extensive leadership experience   • strong strategic, financial, and business acumen   • excellent stakeholder and board -level communication skills
